receipt_freshness.policy: Agents must run make verify-live-nerve before implementation if this receipt is expired.

scope_semantics.ecosystem_green_policy: Do not claim full ecosystem green from this website/platform receipt alone. Full ecosystem green requires every named scope receipt to be PASS, or DEGRADED only when warnings are explicit and accepted by that scope owner.

named_scope_receipts.foundation_pattern: SourceA session/foundation receipts; warning-only from this repo

sourcea_foundation_drift.policy: SourceA drift is a foundation-pattern warning. It must be repaired in SourceA/NOOS, but it does not fail Noetfield www deploy unless a Noetfield runtime/public node fails.

status_language.DEGRADED: Required runtime is usable, but named non-blocking warnings must be acknowledged.
status_language.FAIL: One or more required nodes failed; repair before using docs as truth.
status_language.PASS: All required nodes for the named scope are green.
